overall.description: A character in futuristic armor explores a large spaceship inside an industrial sci-fi hangar, then the perspective shifts to an aerial chase view as the ship takes off and ascends through the hangar opening into a dusk-lit urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the landed spaceship, examining its hull and engines from various angles

entered.detail: large dark metallic spacecraft with red accent lights and visible landing gear
tall metal walls with pipes and industrial detailing
illuminated signage on the hangar wall indicating the manufacturer
rows of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the hangar

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily around a large landed spaceship inside a dimly lit industrial hangar. The environment features metal walls, overhead lighting, and RSI signage, with the ship's detailed hull and engines visible from multiple angles as the camera circles.

events.description: camera perspective switches from third-person character view to aerial chase view of the spaceship
spaceship initiates vertical takeoff and accelerates upward through the hangar shaft
ship emerges from the hangar into the warm dusk lighting of the outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: piloting the spaceship upward through the hangar exit and into the open sky above the city

entered.detail: distant urban buildings silhouetted against the orange and purple dusk sky
tropical trees visible on the horizon line
concrete landing surface marked with the number 06 visible below the ascending ship

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to an aerial chase camera following the spaceship as it lifts off from the hangar floor and accelerates upward. The ship ascends through the hangar shaft and emerges into a dusk-lit environment with a city skyline, palm trees, and a marked landing pad visible below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a grounded exploration of a spaceship's hull within a dim industrial hangar to a high-speed aerial ascent into a twilight city. It begins by circling the landed vessel, gliding past metal walls and RSI signage to capture the detailed engines and hull under overhead lighting. As the perspective shifts upward, the camera becomes an aerial chase view, following the ship as it lifts off the hangar floor and accelerates through the vertical shaft. The scene then opens as the ship emerges from the enclosure, leaving the landing pad and hangar behind to reveal a dusk-lit urban environment. Finally, the view expands to encompass a sprawling city skyline and palm trees under a fading sky.
